tagline: Drafts and redlines contracts, NDAs and filings — a licensed attorney signs anything that's advice.
problem: Routine transactional legal work (NDAs, contracts, filings) is expensive and slow, but the unauthorized-practice-of-law line makes naive automation risky.
outcome: Standard documents drafted and e-signed straight-through; advice-shaped output gated to a licensed attorney; privilege and retention preserved.

steps.does: Intake the request and matter documents
Draft / redline from the clause library for the captured jurisdiction
Classify information vs advice, check conflicts, privilege and jurisdiction scope
A licensed attorney signs off any advice-shaped output before it reaches the client
E-sign permitted documents with intent + tamper-evident audit trail (excluded docs blocked)
File the matter under retention with legal-hold awareness
